untranslatable_reason: The signal requires a zigzag indicator to identify peaks and troughs at a consistent percentage scale. No zigzag or peak/trough detection indicator is available in the allowed indicator list. The core logic of 'filtering price oscillations to isolate objectively-defined peaks and troughs' cannot be expressed with standard OHLCV, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, or Volume indicators. A custom zigzag or peak-detection function would be required.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using returns and price movement thresholds (2.5% filter parameter) but this does NOT capture the core signal logic of zigzag-based peak/trough isolation. The signal is fundamentally dependent on an unavailable indicator type.
